name: loop-superpowers
description: 工具箱模式——把Superpowers的每个技能变成自主mini-loop。7个子skill各自独立闭环，选择技能/设定目标/自动跑到底。 | Toolkit mode — turn every Superpowers skill into an autonomous mini-loop. 7 sub-skills, each an independent closed loop: pick a skill, set a goal, run to completion.
author: loop-superpowers team

skills.name: loop-brainstorming
skills.description: 设定研究方向，自动多轮探索、收敛、产出结构化方案

skills.name: loop-planning
skills.description: 接收方案，自动拆解任务、排优先级、产出可执行 Plan

skills.name: loop-execution
skills.description: 按 Plan 逐个实施 task，内建自检修复循环

skills.name: loop-debugging
skills.description: 接收 bug 描述，自动复现、根因定位、修复、回归验证

skills.name: loop-tdd
skills.description: 红→绿→重构 循环，测试先行驱动实现

skills.name: loop-verification
skills.description: 接收代码产物，自动运行验证命令、审计、产出报告

skills.name: loop-pipeline
skills.description: 串联其他 loop-* skill 的调度器，编排端到端流程

hooks._note: loop-superpowers 不使用 Hook 体系——安全模型基于 Phase Contract 自觉遵守。Hook 字段保留以备未来可选加固。 | loop-superpowers does not use the Hook system — the security model is based on Phase Contract self-discipline. The Hook field is reserved for future optional hardening.
